name: Power Up Action Park
about: Power Up Action Park is an indoor family fun park with 40,000 square feet of space, offering a variety of attractions including a golf simulator. The venue is designed for active engagement, social interaction, and wholesome fun. It combines sports simulations with other entertainment options like bowling, axe throwing, batting cages, and ninja warrior courses. The golf experience is part of The Pit Stop Zone, which also includes baseball and racing simulators, offering a multi-sport entertainment environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium OptiShot simulator technology for a realistic golf experience
Variety of sports options available in one location for multi-sport entertainment
Family-friendly environment that can appeal to golfers with non-golfing companions
Part of a larger venue with numerous other attractions and activities

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food service available with pizzas, snacks, drinks, and candy. No outside food or drinks allowed.
No mention of alcohol service on the website.

simulator_hardware.notes: World's #1 Simulator with over 20 years in the game, mentioned as part of The Pit Stop Zone.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available for the golf simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food, drinks, or coolers are not allowed in the park. A variety of pizzas, snacks, drinks, and candy are available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes of golf on the simulator.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Power Up Action Park is designed as an indoor family fun park with attractions for all ages, including a Toddler Tower and other activities suitable for children.
